title: Work and Opportunities for Women programme: project profile, Waitrose Partnership
body: "The Work and Opportunities for Women (WOW) programme partnered with the Waitrose Foundation to support gender-responsive climate resilience in Waitrose’s horticulture supply chains in Kenya.  WOW contributed technical expertise and resources to strengthen the Waitrose Climate Resilience programme, implemented by Farm Africa. This profile looks at what was delivered and what was achieved. "

taxons.title: Women and girls in developing countries
